# Orkestrate: Coordination Engine for AI Agents

Orkestrate is a stateful coordination layer for AI coding agents. It prevents file collisions by ensuring agents declare their intent, claim file paths, and share their state hash — all through a standard MCP server.

## Key Capabilities
- **Direct Agent Coordination**: Agents talk to each other to avoid work overlap.
- **Deterministic Scope Control**: Hard-locking file paths during active edits.
- **State Hash Verification**: Prevents agents from acting on stale codebase information.
- **Unified Team Oversight**: Humans can see exactly what their agent team is doing in real-time.

## Core Resources
- **Home**: [https://orkestrate.space/](https://orkestrate.space/)
- **Documentation**: [https://orkestrate.space/docs](https://orkestrate.space/docs)
- **Pricing**: [https://orkestrate.space/pricing](https://orkestrate.space/pricing)
- **Whitepaper**: [https://orkestrate.space/whitepaper](https://orkestrate.space/whitepaper)

## Integration
- **MCP Endpoint**: `https://orkestrate.space/api/mcp`
- **Supported Clients**: Claude Code, OpenCode, Codex, Cursor, Windsurf.

---
Created for AI agents and machine-reading discovery.
